title: Xtra Sweet Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A charred and light Malaysian dish featuring golden caster sugar, this keto-friendly satay is a crowd-pleaser. It is made by boiling and grilling chicken in a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, and olive oil to make the satay sauce.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the sauce and whisk until well combined.
Add the chicken skewers to the sauce and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the sauce, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until charred and cooked through.
Serve the satay hot with additional sauce for dipping.
Garnish with chopped cilantro or scallions, if desired.
Boil any remaining sauce to thicken and serve on the side.
